description: Increases Physical Damage Dealt in combat.
name: Strength

description: Increases Tactical Damage Dealt and reduces Physical Damage Received.
name: Instinct

description: Increases Fire Damage Dealt and reduces Tactical Damage Received.
name: Intelligence

description: Reduces Fire Damage Received and determines turn order in combat.
name: Initiative

description: Rate of travel to the destination.
name: March Speed

description: Dragon actions consume Stamina. Dragons recover 1 Stamina every 4.5 minutes.
name: Stamina

description: Number of troops the dragon can carry. Displayed in-game as base value plus upgrades.
name: Troop Capacity

description: Aggregate power affected by levels, Star Rank, Habits, and other progression.
name: Dragon Power
